introSection: Bandit Bomber is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Yas Waterworld in Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, Unite Arab Emirates. Bandit Bomber opened in 2013, and has an interactive water system. A laser gun is attached to each car, so while the ride is in motion, the riders can shoot targets that activates ground effects like water jets and cannons.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The ride consists of two lift hills and small, curved drops, bunny hills, and turns. The track is painted white with white supports.

fullText:
Bandit Bomber is a steel inverted roller coaster located at Yas Waterworld in Abu Dhabi, Abu Dhabi, Unite Arab Emirates. Bandit Bomber opened in 2013, and has an interactive water system. A laser gun is attached to each car, so while the ride is in motion, the riders can shoot targets that activates ground effects like water jets and cannons.

The ride consists of two lift hills and small, curved drops, bunny hills, and turns. The track is painted white with white supports.
